name_en: Premium Hardware Original Leather, New Autumn/Winter Baguette Bag ~ Cognac
name_cn:
Premium Hardware Original Leather, New Autumn/Winter Baguette Bag ~ Cognac
Made of soft and smooth calfskin, this bag stands out with exquisite details such as gold-plated hardware. The hardware letter logo highlights classic style.
Dimensions: W28×H16×D8cm
Number: 5BB265
